plugins.cameraPermission: Cuevas uses the camera so you can take photos and videos for posts, stories, mission check-ins, and business QR scans. For example, you can record a story video or scan a mission QR code.
plugins.microphonePermission: Cuevas uses the microphone to record audio when you create videos or story voiceovers. For example, you can record sound with a story video or add a voiceover to a story.

plugins.photosPermission: Cuevas uses your photo library so you can choose photos and videos for posts, stories, profile photos, and mission proof. For example, you can select a video to share in a post.
plugins.cameraPermission: Cuevas uses the camera so you can take photos and videos for posts, stories, mission check-ins, and business QR scans. For example, you can record a story video or scan a mission QR code.
plugins.microphonePermission: Cuevas uses the microphone to record audio when you create videos or story voiceovers. For example, you can record sound with a story video or add a voiceover to a story.

plugins.photosPermission: Cuevas uses your photo library so you can choose photos and videos for posts, stories, profile photos, and mission proof. For example, you can select a video to share in a post.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Cuevas saves images and videos to your photo library only when you choose to save or share them. For example, you can save a story export or rewards card image to Photos.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Cuevas uses the camera so you can take photos and videos for posts, stories, mission check-ins, and business QR scans. For example, you can record a story video or scan a mission QR code.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Cuevas uses the microphone to record audio when you create videos or story voiceovers. For example, you can record sound with a story video or add a voiceover to a story.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Cuevas uses your photo library so you can choose photos and videos for posts, stories, profile photos, and mission proof. For example, you can select a video to share in a post.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Cuevas saves images and videos to your photo library only when you choose to save or share them. For example, you can save a story export or rewards card image to Photos.
